rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Use implementation annexes only for implementation-level bindings like assignments
Place input assumptions and output guarantees in component type contracts when concrete bounds or visible relations are available
Use valid AGREE syntax: assume/guarantee/eq/const/assign statements inside annex agree blocks
Ensure all referenced identifiers are visible in the current scope
generic_rules: Use named constants for concrete bounds in assumptions and guarantees
Place interface-related contracts in component types, implementation-specific bindings in implementations
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax
Boolean logic expressions use `and`, `or`, and parentheses for grouping
Equations use `eq name : type = expression;` syntax
anti_patterns: Do not place subcomponent port references in component type contracts
Avoid mixing component type and implementation contracts without valid scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties directly in AGREE expressions
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names and unit tokens
